## Problem

Describe the user-visible or maintainer problem this change solves.

## Change

Describe the smallest coherent change and any intentionally unchanged behavior.

## Verification

- [ ] Unit tests pass.
- [ ] `python scripts/check_repository.py` passes.
- [ ] Package and submission checks pass when affected.
- [ ] A negative or stop-boundary case was checked when relevant.
- [ ] Generated `dist/` or private provenance files are not included.

## Boundaries

- [ ] No secrets, private project data, credentials, or local absolute paths are included.
- [ ] Public, destructive, paid, or irreversible actions still require user authority.
- [ ] Compatibility and release claims identify their evidence and do not overstate external approval.
- [ ] Third-party source and license records are preserved when affected.
